name: EGB OE TL.Z./FUCHS PETROL VZ
summary: Fuchs Petrolub SE is a German multinational manufacturer of lubricants and related specialties, headquartered in Mannheim. The company develops, produces, and distributes lubricants for various applications, including automotive, industrial, and specialty sectors. Fuchs Petrolub operates globally, offering a wide range of products and services to customers in numerous industries.
